regional_cost_note: Asphalt contractors in Invercargill typically charge $85–$140/m² for an asphalt driveway and $28–$60/m² for chip seal. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Get a written quote that specifies base preparation — a well-prepared sub-base is the key to a long-lasting driveway.
